en: Righteous are you, O LORD, when I complain to you; yet I would plead my case before you. Why does the way of the wicked prosper? Why do all who are treacherous thrive?
zh: 耶和華啊！我跟你爭辯的時候， 總是你有理； 然而我還要跟你討論有關公正的問題。 惡人的道路為甚麼亨通？ 所有行詭詐的為甚麼都得享安逸？

en: You plant them, and they take root; they grow and produce fruit; you are near in their mouth and far from their heart.
zh: 你栽種了他們，他們也扎了根， 並且長大，結出果實； 他們的口中有你， 心裡卻沒有你 。

en: But you, O LORD, know me; you see me, and test my heart toward you. Pull them out like sheep for the slaughter, and set them apart for the day of slaughter.
zh: 但耶和華啊！你認識我，了解我， 你察驗了我對你的心意。 求你把他們拉出來，好像將宰的羊一般； 求你把他們分別出來，留待宰殺的日子。

en: How long will the land mourn and the grass of every field wither? For the evil of those who dwell in it the beasts and the birds are swept away, because they said, "He will not see our latter end."
zh: 這地悲哀， 田野的青草都枯乾，要等到幾時呢？ 由於這地居民的惡行， 走獸和飛鳥都滅絕了； 因為他們說：“ 神看不見我們的結局。”

en: "If you have raced with men on foot, and they have wearied you, how will you compete with horses? And if in a safe land you are so trusting, what will you do in the thicket of the Jordan?
zh: 耶和華說：“如果你與徒步的人同跑，尚且覺得疲倦， 怎能跟馬賽跑呢？ 你在平安穩妥之地，尚且跌倒， 在約旦河邊的叢林怎麼辦呢？

en: For even your brothers and the house of your father, even they have dealt treacherously with you; they are in full cry after you; do not believe them, though they speak friendly words to you."
zh: 因為連你的兄弟、你的父家， 都以詭詐待你， 連他們也在你後面高聲喊叫。 雖然他們對你說好話， 你也不可信他們。”

en: "I have forsaken my house; I have abandoned my heritage; I have given the beloved of my soul into the hands of her enemies.
zh: “我撇下了我的家， 丟棄了我的產業； 我把我心愛的 交在她仇敵的手中。

en: My heritage has become to me like a lion in the forest; she has lifted up her voice against me; therefore I hate her.
zh: 我的產業對我， 就像樹林中的獅子向我咆哮， 因此我恨惡她。

en: Is my heritage to me like a hyena's lair? Are the birds of prey against her all around? Go, assemble all the wild beasts; bring them to devour.
zh: 我的產業對我，不就像一隻帶斑點的鷙鳥， 其他的鷙鳥都四圍攻擊她？ 你們去聚集田野各樣的走獸， 帶牠們來吃吧！

en: Many shepherds have destroyed my vineyard; they have trampled down my portion; they have made my pleasant portion a desolate wilderness.
zh: 許多牧人毀壞了我的葡萄園， 踐踏了我的田地； 他們使我美好的田地 變為荒涼的曠野。

en: They have made it a desolation; desolate, it mourns to me. The whole land is made desolate, but no man lays it to heart.
zh: 他們使地荒涼， 在我面前一片荒涼悲哀； 全地荒涼， 卻無人關心。”

en: Upon all the bare heights in the desert destroyers have come, for the sword of the LORD devours from one end of the land to the other; no flesh has peace.
zh: 在曠野一切光禿的高岡上， 行毀滅的已經來到了； 因為耶和華的刀。 從地這邊直到地那邊，要吞滅一切； 人人都沒有平安。

en: They have sown wheat and have reaped thorns; they have tired themselves out but profit nothing. They shall be ashamed of their harvests because of the fierce anger of the LORD."
zh: 他們種的是小麥，收的卻是荊棘； 雖然筋疲力竭，卻一無所獲。 因耶和華的烈怒， 他們必為自己的 出產羞愧 。

en: Thus says the LORD concerning all my evil neighbors who touch the heritage that I have given my people Israel to inherit: "Behold, I will pluck them up from their land, and I will pluck up the house of Judah from among them.
zh: 耶和華這樣說：“至於所有邪惡的鄰國，他們侵犯我賜給我子民以色列的產業；看哪！我要把他們從本地拔出來，也要把猶大家從他們中間拔出來。

en: And after I have plucked them up, I will again have compassion on them, and I will bring them again each to his heritage and each to his land.
zh: 但我把他們拔出來以後，我必再憐憫他們，把他們領回來，各自歸回自己的產業，自己的故鄉。

en: And it shall come to pass, if they will diligently learn the ways of my people, to swear by my name, 'As the LORD lives,' even as they taught my people to swear by Baal, then they shall be built up in the midst of my people.
zh: 如果那些鄰近的國家真的學習我子民的道路，指著我的名起誓，說：‘我指著永活的耶和華起誓！’正如他們從前教導我的子民指著巴力起誓一樣，他們就必在我的子民中間被建立起來。

en: But if any nation will not listen, then I will utterly pluck it up and destroy it, declares the LORD."
zh: 他們如果有不聽從的，我就把那國拔出來，把她拔除消滅。”這是耶和華的宣告。
